name: Baby Potatoes Coated with Almonds
recipeInstructions:
1. Steam the baby potatoes until just tender, about 15 minutes. Set aside.
2. In a large bowl, combine almond oil, minced jalapenos, grated ginger, powdered almonds, and cilantro. Mix well.
3. Add the steamed potatoes to the mixture and toss until evenly coated with the almond mixture.
4. Season with salt and pepper to taste.
5. Sprinkle with lemon juice.
6. Spear the potatoes with cocktail sticks and arrange on a serving platter.
7. Serve immediately, or keep warm in an oven set to 250°F for up to 30 minutes.
